activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The hotel cleans the rooms every morning.

evaluator.answer: The rooms are cleaned every morning

activities.explanation: El objeto plural pasa a sujeto y usa «are cleaned».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The bakery delivers fresh bread to the café daily.

evaluator.answer: Fresh bread is delivered to the café daily

activities.explanation: «Fresh bread» es el nuevo sujeto singular incontable y usa «is delivered».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Someone repaired the gate yesterday.

evaluator.answer: The gate was repaired yesterday

activities.explanation: El agente desconocido se omite y el pasado se conserva con «was repaired».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The storm damaged several roofs last night.

evaluator.answer: Several roofs were damaged last night

activities.explanation: El nuevo sujeto plural usa «were damaged».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The library doesn't allow drinks near the computers.

evaluator.answer: Drinks aren't allowed near the computers

activities.explanation: La negativa activa se convierte en «aren't allowed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent and use the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: Local farms grow these strawberries without heated glasshouses.

evaluator.answer: These strawberries are grown without heated glasshouses

activities.explanation: El participio de «grow» es «grown».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent and use the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: The committee chose Mara's photograph for the poster.

evaluator.answer: Mara's photograph was chosen for the poster

activities.explanation: El participio de «choose» es «chosen».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Omit the agent and use the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: Someone took my coat from the back of the chair.

evaluator.answer: My coat was taken from the back of the chair

activities.explanation: El participio de «take» es «taken» y el agente desconocido se omite.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the active question in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Do they check every passport at this desk?

evaluator.answer: Is every passport checked at this desk

activities.explanation: La pregunta pasiva singular comienza con «Is».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the active question in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Did the organisers cancel both afternoon sessions?

evaluator.answer: Were both afternoon sessions cancelled

activities.explanation: La pregunta pasada plural usa «Were ... cancelled?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive continuous. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Workers are widening the pavement outside the school.

evaluator.answer: The pavement outside the school is being widened

activities.explanation: El presente continuo activo se convierte en «is being widened».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive continuous. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The technicians are testing all four backup generators.

evaluator.answer: All four backup generators are being tested

activities.explanation: El nuevo sujeto plural usa «are being tested».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the past passive continuous. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: A nurse was preparing the room when the patient arrived.

evaluator.answer: The room was being prepared when the patient arrived

activities.explanation: La acción singular en progreso usa «was being prepared».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the past passive continuous. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Staff were moving the paintings when the lift stopped.

evaluator.answer: The paintings were being moved when the lift stopped

activities.explanation: La acción plural estaba en progreso: «were being moved».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive and retain the named agent with “by”.
activities.prompt: Local volunteers are restoring the community garden.

evaluator.answer: The community garden is being restored by local volunteers

activities.explanation: El agente relevante se conserva con «by local volunteers».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive and retain the named agent with “by”.
activities.prompt: Aisha Rahman designed the accessible entrance.

evaluator.answer: The accessible entrance was designed by Aisha Rahman

activities.explanation: El agente aporta autoría relevante y se introduce con «by».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the negative passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The courier didn't deliver the parcel to the correct address.

evaluator.answer: The parcel wasn't delivered to the correct address

activities.explanation: La negativa pasada singular se forma con «wasn't delivered».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the negative passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The website doesn't display users' private notes.

evaluator.answer: Users' private notes aren't displayed on the website

activities.explanation: La información plural pasa a sujeto y usa «aren't displayed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite as a passive question beginning with “When”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: When did the council approve the revised plan?

evaluator.answer: When was the revised plan approved

activities.explanation: La pregunta pasiva es «When was ... approved?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite as a passive question beginning with “Why”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Why do staff lock this door during performances?

evaluator.answer: Why is this door locked during performances

activities.explanation: La pregunta sobre una práctica actual usa «Why is ... locked?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite both active clauses in the passive. Omit the agents.
activities.prompt: Staff check the filters monthly and replaced two of them last week.

evaluator.answer: The filters are checked monthly and two of them were replaced last week

activities.explanation: La rutina usa «are checked» y el evento pasado «were replaced».

activities.instructions: Rewrite both active clauses in the passive. Omit the agents.
activities.prompt: Workers are resurfacing the road, so the police are diverting traffic.

evaluator.answer: The road is being resurfaced, so traffic is being diverted

activities.explanation: Ambas acciones actuales en progreso usan «is being + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive. Retain the agent and instrument exactly where relevant.
activities.prompt: Dr Farah signed the certificate with a blue fountain pen.

evaluator.answer: The certificate was signed by Dr Farah with a blue fountain pen

activities.explanation: «By» introduce al agente y «with» al instrumento.

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive, keeping the interrupted past action and omitting the agent.
activities.prompt: The team was testing the alarm when the power cut interrupted them.

evaluator.answer: The alarm was being tested when the power cut interrupted the team

activities.explanation: La acción en curso se convierte en «was being tested»; la segunda cláusula conserva su agente.

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive, beginning with “A certificate” and retaining the recipient.
activities.prompt: The training provider gave every participant a certificate.

evaluator.answer: A certificate was given to every participant by the training provider

activities.explanation: El objeto directo pasa a sujeto; el destinatario se mantiene con «to» y el agente con «by».
